body: Update Thermodynamics to 0.12.8 and modify Jacobian accordingly.
title: Update Thermodynamics

body: It seems that too many files are moved to the reference path, and I'm trying to understand why #3319 is failing, so this PR changes the `readdir` to printing all of the files (`readdir` is not recursive) moved to the reference path when all files are moved on central.
title: Improve regression debug info during move
